# SmartPixel

> SmartPixel is a Chennai-based web design and development agency that builds conversion-focused websites, ecommerce stores, mobile apps, SEO and WhatsApp automation for small and mid-size businesses across Chennai and India.

Founded in 2023 by Aysha, SmartPixel is headquartered in Chrompet, Chennai (Tamil Nadu, India) and serves clients in Pallavaram, Tambaram, Chrompet, Guindy, T Nagar, Saidapet, Nungambakkam and Chitlapakkam, as well as remote clients across India.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.smartpixel.in
- Email: workwithsmartpixel@gmail.com
- Phone: +91-98860-69488, +91-91649-75073
- Location: Chrompet, Chennai 600044, Tamil Nadu, India
- Hours: Mon–Sat, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM IST

## Services

- [Web Design Chennai](https://www.smartpixel.in/services/web-design-chennai): Conversion-focused website design. Starts at ₹15,000.
- [Web App Development](https://www.smartpixel.in/services/web-app-development): Custom web applications and SaaS dashboards.
- [Mobile App Development](https://www.smartpixel.in/services/mobile-app-development): iOS and Android apps for service businesses and startups. Starts at ₹1,50,000.
- [Ecommerce Website Chennai](https://www.smartpixel.in/ecommerce-website-chennai): Custom ecommerce stores with payments, catalogues and CRO. Starts at ₹50,000.
- [SEO Services Chennai](https://www.smartpixel.in/seo-services-chennai): On-page, technical and local SEO for high-intent search rankings. Starts at ₹15,000/month.
- [WhatsApp Automation Chennai](https://www.smartpixel.in/whatsapp-automation-chennai): WhatsApp Business API, chatbots and lead automation.
- [Digital Marketing Chennai](https://www.smartpixel.in/services/digital-marketing-chennai): Performance marketing, paid ads and growth.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does a SmartPixel website cost?**
Business websites start at ₹15,000. Ecommerce stores start at ₹50,000. Mobile apps start at ₹1,50,000. Every project includes a free strategy call before a final quote.

**How long does a website build take?**
Average turnaround is 2 weeks for business websites, 2–3 weeks for ecommerce, and 6+ weeks for mobile apps.

**Does SmartPixel work with businesses outside Chennai?**
Yes. SmartPixel is based in Chrompet, Chennai but works with clients across India remotely.

**What makes SmartPixel different?**
One team owns each project end-to-end — no account managers, no handoffs. Clients talk directly to the people building their product.

**Does SmartPixel offer support after launch?**
Yes. All projects include a post-launch support period, with optional retainers for maintenance and growth.

## Notable Case Studies

- Triumph Travels — travel agency website modernised for faster enquiries.
- Priya Silver Jewellery — first ecommerce presence for a jewellery brand.
- VJ Real Estate — luxury Pune real estate platform with dynamic SEO architecture.
- Gulf To World Consultants — premium immigration brand site.
- Travel Hub Tambaram — booked calls tripled in first month after rebuild.
- LTS Learning Academy — career-focused tech training site in 3 weeks.
- Manohar Jewelleries — first online catalogue for a 30-year jewellery brand.
- Ayishro — premium RO water purification brand site for Chennai.
- Get Butterflies — animated luxury saree styling studio website.
